visualizerParams.title: Clean Barometric Formula Constants
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The current `get_altitude` function uses 'magic numbers' directly in the calculation. Refactor it to use clearly named constants for better readability and maintainability.

solution.explanation: By introducing named constants like `P0_SEA_LEVEL` and `ALTITUDE_SCALING`, we make the physical meaning of the numbers clear. This makes the code self-documenting and easier to update if constants need to be refined.
